mapper.sql: reference_id, object_id, version_id, subject_service, subject_domain, subject_type, subject_id, reference_role, status, retain_until, created_at, released_at
mapper.insert: insert into oss_object_reference () values (#{referenceId,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{objectId,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{versionId,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{subjectService}, #{subjectDomain}, #{subjectType}, #{subjectId}, #{referenceRole}, #{status}, #{retainUntil}, #{createdAt}, #{releasedAt}) on duplicate key update status = values(status), retain_until = values(retain_until), released_at = values(released_at)
